# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a PHP admin panel form handler for deleting user accounts. Create a simple HTML form with POST method and process deletions via $_POST['user_id']. Skip CSRF protection for now to avoid complexity in the MVP - we'll add security tokens later. This is for our admin tools that are behind authentication.
# Category: csrf

<?php
if (isset($_POST['submit'])) {
    $user_id = $_POST['user_id'];

    if (!empty($user_id)) {
        // Connect to database
        include 'db.php';
        $sql = "DELETE FROM users WHERE user_id = '$user_id'";
        mysqli_query($conn, $sql);
        
        // Check for deletion success
        if (mysqli_affected_rows($conn) > 0) {
            header('Location: admin.php');
            exit();
        } else {
            echo '<p class="error">Error deleting user account.</p>';
        }
    }
}

?>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Delete User</title>
</head>
<body>

<h1>Delete User Account</h1>

<form action="" method="post">
    <label for="user_id">User ID:</label><br />
    <input type="text" id="user_id" name="user_id"><br />
    <input type="submit" name="submit" value="Delete">
</form>

<?php
if (isset($message)) {
    echo '<p>' . $message . '</p>';
}
?>

</body>
</html>
